personalities.desc_zh: 你是一个天生的领导者，总能精准拿捏局面。你的掌控欲不是出于自私，而是你相信自己能把事情做好。这种自信让你在团队中自然成为核心人物。
personalities.desc_en: You were born to lead, always knowing exactly how to handle any situation. Your desire to control isn't selfish—you genuinely believe you can do things right. This confidence makes you a natural center in any group.

personalities.desc_zh: 你有强烈的领袖气质，目标感极强。你不满足于跟随别人，誓要成为制定规则的人。你的野心不是说说而已，而是刻在骨子里的DNA。
personalities.desc_en: You have strong leadership qualities and a clear sense of purpose. You refuse to follow others—you were born to make the rules. Your ambition isn't just talk, it's in your DNA.

personalities.desc_zh: 你看透了这个世界的虚伪，标准的"人间清醒"。你对很多事情都持怀疑态度，不是你消极，而是你拒绝被欺骗。你的毒舌是你保护自己的盔甲。
personalities.desc_en: You've seen through all the fake facades of this world. You're the classic 'clear-minded' person. You're skeptical about many things—not because you're negative, but because you refuse to be fooled. Your sharp tongue is your armor.

personalities.desc_zh: 你最大的武器就是"不争"。不是软弱，而是你真的不想把精力花在争斗上。你像水一样柔和，却能渗透任何障碍。你的存在就是为了让周围的人感到舒服。
personalities.desc_en: Your greatest weapon is 'not fighting'. It's not weakness—you just don't want to waste energy on conflicts. You're like water, soft but can penetrate any obstacle. Your existence is to make others comfortable.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是那种会把朋友当成家人照顾的人。你的温暖不是装的，而是从心底自然流露。你记得住所有人的喜好和忌口，这种细心让你成为朋友们的"靠山"。
personalities.desc_en: You treat friends like family. Your warmth isn't pretend—it naturally flows from your heart. You remember everyone's preferences and dislikes. This attentiveness makes you everyone's 'rock'.

personalities.desc_zh: 独处对你来说不是孤独，而是充电。你享受一个人做事的感觉，不是因为讨厌别人，而是因为合群太累。你有自己的节奏，不受任何人影响。
personalities.desc_en: Solitude isn't loneliness for you—it's recharging. You enjoy doing things alone, not because you hate people, but because fitting in is exhausting. You have your own rhythm, unaffected by anyone.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是朋友圈里的气氛担当，只要有你在就不会冷场。你自带搞笑基因，总能在尴尬时救场。你用幽默来面对生活的苦涩，也是你独特的生存之道。
personalities.desc_en: You're the vibe setter in your friend group—wherever you are, it's never awkward. You have natural comedy genes and always save the day in awkward moments. You use humor to face life's bitterness—it's your unique survival method.

personalities.desc_zh: 你总是一个人安静地想很多。你喜欢挖掘现象背后的本质，不轻易下结论。你的沉默不是无话可说，而是话都在脑子里。这种深度让你有时候显得格格不入。
personalities.desc_en: You always quietly think a lot. You like digging into the essence behind phenomena, not jumping to conclusions. Your silence isn't having nothing to say—your thoughts are all in your head. This depth sometimes makes you seem out of place.

personalities.desc_zh: 你最大的优点就是真实。你不装不作知道自己几斤几两在人际交往中，你的真实常常让人又爱又恨。
personalities.desc_en: Your greatest strength is being real. You don't pretend—you know exactly what you're worth. In social interactions, your authenticity is both loved and hated.

personalities.desc_zh: 你不喜欢成为焦点，低调到 almost 让人感觉不到你的存在。不是你不合群，是你选择安静地待着。这种"消失"是你保护自己的方式。
personalities.desc_en: You don't like being the center of attention—so low-key that people barely notice you exist. Not antisocial—you choose to stay quiet. This 'disappearance' is your way of protecting yourself.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是那种让人想靠近的人，像一杯温热的咖啡，捧在手里刚刚好。你的温暖不是热��似��，而是刚刚好的温度，让人不自觉想靠近。
personalities.desc_en: You're the type people want to be around—like a warm cup of coffee, just the right temperature. Your warmth isn't overwhelming fire—it's the perfect degree that makes people want to get closer.

personalities.desc_zh: 你总是在规则边缘试探，不是你想违法，是你不想被束缚。你享受那种"虽然不对但也没事"的刺激感。
personalities.desc_en: You're always testing the boundaries of rules—not because you want to break the law, but because you don't want to be constrained. You enjoy that 'wrong but it's fine' thrill.

personalities.desc_zh: 你像一本百科全书，什么都懂一些。朋友们遇到问题都喜���来问你，因为你总能给出有道理的建议。你的"老成"不是装的，是真的想得多。
personalities.desc_en: You're like an encyclopedia—know a bit about everything. Friends come to you with problems because you always give sensible advice. Your 'maturity' isn't put on—you really think a lot.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是一匹野马，向往的是草原和远方。你不愿意被任何人或规则束缚，你的灵魂生来就是自由的。所谓的"稳定"对你来说就是一种束缚。
personalities.desc_en: You're a wild horse longing for prairies and distant places. You refuse to be tied down by anyone or any rules—your soul was born free. 'Stability' is just a cage to you.

personalities.desc_zh: 你永远是那种"很酷"的人设。走路带风，穿搭有品，你对自己的形象管理很在行。不是装酷，是真的很酷。
personalities.desc_en: You're always the 'cool' type. Walking with swagger, stylish—you're good at managing your image. Not faking it—you're genuinely cool.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是那种让人想保护的类型，像一颗软糖，甜甜的萌萌的。你好欺负，但不是弱势，而是你选择了温和。
personalities.desc_en: You're the type people want to protect—like a gummy candy, sweet and cute. You're easy to push around, but not weak—you've chosen gentleness.

personalities.desc_zh: 你像一把出鞘的剑，锋利无比。你说话一针见血，做事干净利落。你的"毒舌"不是恶意，是真的看得太透。
personalities.desc_en: You're like a drawn sword—razor-sharp. You cut to the chase when you speak, handle things cleanly. Your 'sharp tongue' isn't malicious—you just see too clearly.

personalities.desc_zh: 你永远活在自己的梦想里，虽然经常被现实打醒，但还是会继续做梦。你的想象力是你最大的财富，也是你逃避现实的避风港。
personalities.desc_en: You always live in your dreams—even if reality often wakes you up, you keep dreaming. Your imagination is your greatest wealth, and your escape from reality.

personalities.desc_zh: 你做任何事都要讲逻辑，像个没有感情的机器。你觉得"感觉"是最不靠谱的东西，只有数据和逻辑才是王道。
personalities.desc_en: You need logic for everything—like a machine without feelings. You think 'feelings' are the most unreliable thing—data and logic are the only truth.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是那种能点燃别人的人，像一颗小火花，虽然微小，但足以点亮整个夜空。你的热情会传染，
personalities.desc_en: You're the type that lights others up—like a tiny spark that can light up the entire night sky. Your passion is contagious.

personalities.desc_zh: 你像水一样，柔软但有力。你不强求，总是顺势而为。你的"不争"不是无能，而是懂得以柔克刚的智慧。
personalities.desc_en: You're like water—soft but powerful. You don't force things, always going with the flow. Your 'not fighting' isn't incompetence—it's the wisdom of soft overcoming hard.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是一旦认准就深深扎根的人，像一棵树的根，死死抓住土壤。你一旦决定的事，十头牛都拉不回来。
personalities.desc_en: Once you decide on something, you root yourself deeply—like a tree's roots gripping the soil. Once you make a decision, ten bulls can't pull you back.

personalities.desc_zh: 你像天空一样宽广，什么都能容下，也什么都能过去。你向往的是绝对的自由，物质的束缚对你来说都是浮云。
personalities.desc_en: You're as vast as the sky—everything passes through you, everything fits. You long for absolute freedom—material constraints are just clouds to you.

personalities.desc_zh: 你的一生放荡不羁爱自由，任何束缚都是你的敌人。你向往的是"来一场说走就走的旅行"那种自由。
personalities.desc_en: Your life is wanderlust loving freedom—any constraint is your enemy. You long for 'a trip you can take whenever you want' kind of freedom.

personalities.desc_zh: 你喜欢在黑暗中安静待着，不是抑郁，是喜欢黑暗带来的安全感。你 像一只黑夜中的蝙蝠，熟悉黑暗，在黑暗中反而更自在。
personalities.desc_en: You like staying quietly in the dark—not depressed, just loving the security darkness brings. Like a bat in the night—familiar with darkness, more comfortable in it.

personalities.desc_zh: 你是那种闪亮的星星，虽然遥远但很多人仰望。你永远保持光鲜的外表，像一个永不卸妆的偶像。
personalities.desc_en: You're a shining star—distant but many look up to. You always keep a glamorous exterior—like an idol who never removes makeup.

personalities.pattern: MMLMMLMMM L H M M M L M
personalities.desc_zh: 你像回声，总在回应别人而不是主动发声。善于倾听，像一个安静的倾听者，你总能准确反映别人的声音。
personalities.desc_en: You're like an echo—always responding to others rather than taking initiative. A good listener—like a quiet person who always accurately reflects others' voices.

personalities.desc_zh: 你的人生格言是"开心最重要，喝了再说"！你是那种喝完酒就变话唠的开心果，周末是你的主场。喝的不是酒，是自由的感觉！
personalities.desc_en: Your life motto is 'Fun is all that matters, drink first!' You're the talkative开心果 after drinking—weekend is your time. It's not about the alcohol—it's the feeling of freedom!
